case_title: ANA FLORES VS. GREGORY L. RICHEY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO, INC. $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $59.17 INTEREST, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,694.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) WAIVER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVER>) SERVED AUG-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHEY, GREGORY L.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-07-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS GOING TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT AND RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DOUGLAS HAAKE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-11-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $35.00) SERVED APR-17-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHEY, GREGORY L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DOUGLAS HAAKE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY FLORES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT RICHEY, GREGORY L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF ANA FLORES AMENDING CLAIM ADDING DEFENDANT AND CHANGING PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,659.17 FILED BY FLORES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO, INC.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (NO FEE: IFP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-13-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY DOUGLAS HAAKE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT RICHEY, GREGORY L.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-08-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY DOUGLAS HAAKE. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO,
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANA
